infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MedDiagnose needs camera access to photograph your medical reports for AI-powered health assessment.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MedDiagnose needs photo library access to upload medical report images for AI-powered health assessment.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: MedDiagnose may save copies of your uploaded reports to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: MedDiagnose reads your health data (steps, heart rate, sleep, etc.) to sync with your fitness tracker and provide better health insights.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: MedDiagnose may save health data to Apple Health for your fitness tracking.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: MedDiagnose reads your health data (steps, heart rate, sleep) to sync with your fitness tracker.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: MedDiagnose may save health data to Apple Health for your fitness tracking.

plugins.photosPermission: MedDiagnose needs access to your photos to upload medical reports.
plugins.cameraPermission: MedDiagnose needs camera access to photograph medical reports.
